case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOC.INC ("NCVA") VS ELDER CREEK GENERAL PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CASE BECAUSE IT WAS FILED IN THE WRONG COURT, FILED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF, NCVA IN RESPONSE TO DEFT'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF CASE, FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOC.INC ("NCVA") IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELDER CREEK GENERAL PARTNERSHIP THIS CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE VENUE IS NOT PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM, MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOC.INC ("NCVA") AS TO DEFENDANT ELDER CREEK GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
